title: 'Magnificent 7' stocks have lost $2 trillion so far this month, driving the S&P 500 decline: Chart of the Day
sentences: 'Magnificent 7' stocks have lost $2 trillion so far this month, driving the S&P 500 decline: Chart of the Day The group has erased roughly $1.8 trillion in market value this month, while the rest of the S&P 500 is still holding up.
